{{Missing Info|specifics=form, element, realm, second HARD}}

{{Shell
|name={{#titleparts:{{PAGENAME}}}}
|image={{#titleparts:{{PAGENAME}}}}.png
|description=The Dream Fairy, who owns Snail Shell, was a stage performer of some renown. To create more emotionally moving shows, they would insist on using real plants to construct stages and props, and Snail Shell is their masterpiece.
|affct=FTH
|hard=DEF
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=9399
|relic1=Brisingamen
|relic2=Gefjon's Plough
|relic3=Theogony
|relic4=Bowl of Hygieia
|relic5=The Thread of Fate
}}
|color=green
|earth=3
|water=3
|fire=0
|wind=0
|form=
|element=
|realm=
|orangehard=
}}
